name: secrets
description: Encrypted secret management for Cloudflare Workers — a self-hosted vault with CLI.

scripts.changelog: GITHUB_TOKEN=${GITHUB_TOKEN:-$(gh auth token 2>/dev/null)} git-cliff -o CHANGELOG.md || git-cliff --offline -o CHANGELOG.md
scripts.sync-version: npm pkg set version=$(cat VERSION) && npm --prefix hfs pkg set version=$(cat VERSION) && printf 'export const VERSION = "%s";\n' $(cat VERSION) > secret-vault/src/version.ts

author: Timothy Schneider <tim@taslabs.net> (https://flarelylegal.com/)
